data.name: Hentai Magical Warriors
data.detailed_description:
The day you were finally going to lose it, it wasn’t a girl opening her legs… but an interdimensional portal in your room. Out came a Succuvoid so hot she almost milked you dry. Just as you were about to cum into the beyond, a mini-skirted magical warrior burst in and saved you… by swallowing it.

That’s when you discovered the cruel truth: your dick is basically the Master Key to the Celestial Climax, an orgasmic weapon capable of shaking universes. Now three sexy magical warriors want to “train” you into their milky god, while hordes of wet demonesses plan to drain you drier than a desert.

The fate of reality is hanging between your legs. Will you fight with magic sex… or let yourself be devoured to the very last drop?

💦 Lucy – Squirtia

The shy and wet one. Delivers packages by day, grabs yours by night. Serious until she gets excited… then everything gets soaked.

Attack: Interdimensional Purifying Squirt

🔥 Bibi – Spankia

The fiery tsundere leader with a tempting ass. Charges you at the store by day, sets you ablaze by night. Pretends she doesn’t want you… but one spark of her burning tongue will melt you to her mercy.

Attack: Cosmic Slap of Sweet Pain

🍬 Minusa – Moeia

Ultra-kawaii and effortlessly perverted. Loves to say dirty things with a sweet voice. Karaoke host with a filthy tongue. Kills you with cuteness… and finishes you off with pleasure while calling you “senpai.”

Attack: Sweet Melody of Seduction

😈 The Succuvoid

A demon goddess that doesn’t ask: she takes you, milks you, and breaks you with orgasms until you scream her name. Her tongue is sweet poison, her body an altar of lust. She doesn’t fuck: she dominates and leaves you trembling, soulless and drained.

FEATURES

  • Finally: animations! Some girls feature a special animated scene.

  • Animated H Scenes: find some H scenes that are animated as you progress through the story.

  • Shape the story: choose the protagonist’s name and build your own story, making decisions that create branching paths in the narrative.

  • Hide the interface: you can hide the interface at any time if you want to admire the scenery and the game’s artwork.

  • Gallery: as you progress through the story, you will unlock albums that let you easily revisit your favorite moments.

  • Navigation options: go hands-free by enabling auto-play text, or skip it entirely to reach your favorite parts! You can also go back at any time to change a decision.

  • Immersive audio: enjoy music, sound effects, voices, and "other effects." Adjust each volume independently or mute everything.

PLEASE NOTE

  • All characters depicted and visually represented in this game are over 18 years old, and no real or identifiable minors were used in the production of this game.

  • We’re still working on it: all improvements and new content we develop will be added to the game at no additional cost.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間
